evals.prompt: Write an implementation plan for adding user authentication with JWT tokens
evals.expected_output: A detailed markdown plan in .planning/plans/ with overview, goals, technical approach, implementation steps, dependencies, risks, testing strategy, and success criteria

evals.prompt: Create a plan to implement a REST API for managing user profiles
evals.expected_output: A detailed plan with API endpoints, data models, authentication requirements, and implementation steps

evals.prompt: Break down this feature into a plan: add a dashboard showing analytics charts with real-time data updates
evals.expected_output: A plan with steps for frontend components, backend API, WebSocket setup, and data visualization
